info.title: Welcome to Updater
info.description:
Assembly: updater, Version=1.0.18.0, Culture=neutral, PublicKeyToken=null
Information:
updater.exe save configuration(updaterConfig.json) of previus call,
and later can call only with changed arguments
Samples:
Upload SomeFreeApp To Update Server:
updater.exe -c Upload -u http://localhost:5000 -a SomeFreeApp -e SomeFreeApp.dll
Update SomePrivateApp From Update Server:
updater.exe -c Update -u http://localhost:5000 -a SomePrivateApp -e SomePrivateApp.dll -t Qwerty123
Returns:
0    Success
1    Service call fail
2    Arguments exception

options.name: --path
options.description:
Application Path
Default: updater binary location path

options.name: --version
options.description:
Alternativ for --Entry Library
For non .net applications

options.name: --token
options.description:
Token of Application
Ignore for free Applications

options.name: --command
options.description:
Command (Update, Upload, Restore, Configure, ServerUpdate, ServerRestore)
Default: Update

options.name: --online
options.description:
Run Update/Restore with respect to running target Application
true, false, <empty>-true

options.name: -au
options.description:
Subscribe updates Notificateion
And run update if new version released
true, false, <empty>-true
